CONFIDENTIAL — INTERNAL ONLY — Embargo until 14:00 AEST, 18 July 2026; do not circulate externally.
Board Briefing: Project Wattle — proposed Scheme Implementation Deed between Quenda Robotics Pty Ltd and Gidgee Capital Partners Pty Ltd (parent: Monarto Holdings Limited, SBX-listed).
Presenter: Ms. Lila Tran (CFO); attendees include Mr. Owen Merrick (Legal Counsel) and Dr. Priya Eltham (Chair).
Key economics (strictly not generally available): EV AUD 185,000,000; 52% premium to 20-day VWAP; consideration 60% cash / 40% Monarto scrip; expected completion late Q3 FY26.
Definitive agreements: SID in substantially final form as at 17 July 2026; execution targeted 18 July 2026 subject to confirmatory tax and accounting sign-offs.
MAC clause summary: no Material Adverse Change has occurred; for clarity, changes in general economic/market conditions or pandemics will not constitute a MAC for the target.
Disclosure and IR: continuous disclosure obligations under SBX Listing Rule 3.1A (analogue) considered; draft exchange announcement and investor-relations Q&A prepared and embargoed to the above time.
Regulatory: notification to the Commonwealth Markets Commission; no foreign investment issues; if contested, escalation path to Commonwealth Takeovers Chamber noted.
Financing: AUD 120,000,000 committed bridge from Wallaby Ridge Bank Pty Ltd (definitive commitment letter executed); conditions limited to SID execution and customary bring-downs.
Employment/health: no planned redundancies; equity awards to roll on equivalent terms; OH&S health metrics provided to diligence room in aggregated, de-identified form only.
Credit/transaction: under Senior Facilities Agreement with Mintbush Finance No.1 Pty Ltd, 66⅔% lender consent required; soft-soundings indicate support; draft waiver letter and consent checklist attached.
Public-source reference: commodity outlook assumptions drawn from the 2025 Mallee Coast University Resources Survey (publicly available), which is not MNPI.
Negated MAC note: the Q4 slowdown in a single customer pilot is not expected to be a MAC under the SID.
lowercase pm: todo: update gantt, circulate clean redline to directors, and confirm videoconference links for execution.
Benign HR reminder: staff wellness “spa-day” voucher raffle on 19 July; unrelated to Project Wattle and not to be discussed in deal forums.
Governance: Karrinyup Advisory (independent expert) has delivered a draft “fair and reasonable” opinion; the Board intends to unanimously recommend, subject to no superior proposal and usual carve-outs.
Contact: Ms. Lila Tran (CFO) — lila.tran@quendarobotics.au.example; Mr. Owen Merrick (Legal) — owen.merrick@quendarobotics.au.example.
